public/gm-api.js.responsibility: Send GM campaign and map API requests and convert failed responses into client errors.

public/gm-controller.js.responsibility: Coordinate GM workflows across API, state, view, and Socket.IO boundaries.

public/gm-events.js.responsibility: Translate static and delegated GM DOM events into controller actions.

public/gm-state.js.responsibility: Maintain GM campaign library and current campaign client state.

public/gm-view.js.responsibility: Render the GM campaign library, map controls, messages, status, and active map.

public/gm.js.responsibility: Compose and start the browser-native GM client modules.

public/player.js.responsibility: Render read-only player active-map and connection state updates.

scripts/check-harness-compliance.js.responsibility: Run repository harness validation and report actionable compliance failures.

scripts/check-module-baseline.js.responsibility: Validate the production JavaScript inventory and physical-line ratchet.

scripts/create-dev-cert.js.responsibility: Generate and inspect local HTTPS development certificates.

scripts/harness-compliance.js.responsibility: Validate phase-aware feature evidence, review findings, tracker state, and the closed legacy baseline.

scripts/harness-markdown.js.responsibility: Parse exact governed feature-document, tracker, stage, and Markdown table structures.

scripts/harness-repository.js.responsibility: Discover governed feature records, resolve canonical follow-up links, and coordinate repository validation.

scripts/run-quality.js.responsibility: Run read-only local quality stages in a clear fail-fast order.

scripts/start-local.js.responsibility: Prepare certificates, resolve LAN addresses, and start the local server workflow.

server/campaign-storage.js.responsibility: Manage campaign metadata, map ordering, filesystem persistence, and asset containment.

temporaryException.reason: Schema, validation, serialization, and filesystem responsibilities are awaiting planned separation.

server/certs.js.responsibility: Resolve and load HTTPS certificate credentials.

server/index.js.responsibility: Compose HTTP routes, role projection, Socket.IO synchronization, and HTTPS startup.

temporaryException.reason: HTTP, role, socket, and startup responsibilities are awaiting planned separation.

server/map-image.js.responsibility: Validate supported map image signatures, metadata, and size limits.

server/state.js.responsibility: Maintain snapshot-safe in-memory active campaign state.
